title: Add --digestfile and Re-add push statement as debug
body:
We removed the "Succesfully pushed ..." statement from the end of
the `buildah push` command in #1744.  However we've had a request
for that information still so I'm re-adding it as a debug statement
and we can discuss if there's a better way or not.

Also add the --digestfile option.  With it the user will be able
to specify a file to write the digest of the pushed image to for
reference.

Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

comments.body: @TomSweeneyRedHat Why are they asking for this?
@rhatdan the why is listed in #1744, they'd come to rely on that data as a way to track which images they'd pushed.

:pushpin: Commit dcd68bd has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan dcd68bd61831e0e9fa5aea30ecdc1c041b73aca6 -->
@rhatdan I was planning to add it to Podman too, we'll see if @mheon thinks it's a need or not!  :^)
